review_text:
Highly recommended. He pick you up from your stay and drop off afterwards. He always checking up on you, making sure you're comfortable. It's very entertaining. He's very cleared on how the programme works. We really enjoyed ourselves.. he's the best.

An amazing adventure—perfectly planned from start to finish, including convenient hotel pickup and drop-off. Our best memories are riding quad bikes across the desert, the adrenaline-filled 4x4 drive over the dunes, and the guide’s incredible dedication to making sure everything was organized flawlessly and exceeded our expectations. We will definitely use his services again next time!
The trip was absolutely incredible! From the thrilling dune bashing to the stunning desert views, everything was perfectly organized. An unforgettable experience. Highly recommended!
Excellent everything, a beautiful family experience, atv, safari through the dunes and dinner with show more than recommended, Malik the best

review_title: An Exceptional and Memorable Desert Safari
review_text: We had an absolutely amazing experience on the private dessert safari. From start to finish, everything was perfectly organized and felt truly special. The privacy made the entire trip more relaxing and personal, and the Malik went above and beyond to make sure we were comfortable and enjoying every moment. The scenery was breathtaking, the activities were fun and well-timed, and the overall atmosphere was unforgettable. It was a unique and memorable experience that exceeded all our expectations. Highly recommended for anyone looking for something truly special.

We had an amazing experience with the dune ride to safari. Our driver Irfan Malik was very courteous, professional and skillful. The trip started off great with ATV rides (extra cost). Followed by drone bashing and board sand sliding (was added without any cost), then we headed to dessert where we had dinner and live performances. Everything was well planned and our driver guided us at every step and was always there to check on us. Highly recommended.
Malik Irfan is an excellent safari guide. He is a very skilled driver and helped us get discounts, he cares a lot about his customers and takes care of them. Would recommend to anyone in Dubai.

ighly recommend this company

Highly recommended for a unique and thrilling safari experience in Dubai! Everything was well organized, and Malik was knowledgeable and attentive, always checking on our well-being throughout the trip. The dune bashing ride was exciting and perfectly accompanied by suitable Arabic music, which really set the mood. The BBQ food was good and satisfying after the adventure, and the fire performance was definitely a highlight for me — very entertaining and memorable. Overall, an amazing experience from start to finish!
Malek is an experience guide and driver. He provide professional advise and guidance for the desert safari. We had an enjoyable experience as a family.

I had an amazing safari experience in Dubai and would highly recommend it to anyone visiting! Our driver, Malik, was exceptionally good—very knowledgeable, professional, and always checking in to make sure we were comfortable and doing well throughout the trip. The dune rides were thrilling and truly a unique experience that made the adventure unforgettable.

The BBQ dinner was nice and satisfying, with a good variety of food. One of the highlights of the evening was the fire performance, which I especially enjoyed—it was exciting and added a great atmosphere to the night. Overall, it was a fantastic experience from start to finish, made even better by Malik’s excellent service. Highly recommended! 🌟

Malik was on time and he has a very good car. He went through everything with us before we started, sent us on time so we can go on the buggy. He then made sure we were comfortable before he started the dune bashing. It was safe and fun. He even made sure we wore out seat belt. He also chose the most premium camp. He also made sure all were eating well. Basically Malik took care of us from start to finish. Well recommended.
Thrilling dune bashing with Malik Safari—professional driver, stunning views, unforgettable desert fun! Safe, fun, friendly driver and an amazing desert experience.

It was my first time doing the desert safari in Dubai, and it turned out to be an unforgettable experience! The guide was super friendly and helpful — when I couldn’t handle the bike, he immediately helped me switch to a buggy and made sure I was comfortable and safe. The whole trip was well organized — from the dune bashing to the desert views and dinner, everything was perfect.

Highly recommended for first-time tourists! The guide made the experience easy, fun, and full of great memories. 🌅🏜️

I’d like to express my sincere thanks to Mr. Zubair Malik for his outstanding service during our Dubai desert safari. He arranged the premium package with comfortable sofa-style seating and guided us to an excellent buffet dinner that impressed us all. He also suggested the self-driving buggy for our family with kids, which turned out to be the highlight of the trip. Zubair’s professionalism, attentiveness, and thoughtful suggestions made our experience seamless and memorable. If you’re seeking a desert safari with exceptional service and family-friendly fun, Zubair is the person to trust.

review_title: A Must Do Excursion in Dubai
review_text:
I had the opportunity to enjoy an unforgettable day excursion with Dunes Discovery Tours, and it was absolutely amazing! Our guide, Malik, was not only knowledgeable and professional but also incredibly engaging and fun. From start to finish, the experience was seamless, exciting, and full of unforgettable moments.

If you're planning a trip to Dubai, I highly recommend booking with Dunes Discovery Tours, you won’t be disappointed!
We had a good experience, and the desert safari was a blast. Be sure if you have motion sickness take something before hand. Be sure to take pictures with the bird.
Malik is incredible! He really does pay attention to your needs and looks after you so well! It was such an incredible day and I have used Malik a few times now and would highly recommend him!
Best experience, highly recommend. Malik Was the best guide and made it 10x better! This is a must on your list if you come to Dubai.

Absolutely amazing desert safari experience! We started with a thrilling dune buggy ride, followed by some seriously fun dune bashing in a 4x4 – our driver had skills! After the adrenaline rush, we relaxed at a desert camp with a tasty buffet dinner and a fantastic show. The belly dancers and fire breathers were the perfect end to an unforgettable evening. Everything was well-organized and the staff were great. Highly recommend if you’re visiting the area!

review_title: Absolutely Incredible Desert Experience – A Must-Do in Dubai! Rating: 5 Stars
review_text:
Our desert adventure with Dunes Discovery Dubai was hands-down one of the best experiences we had in the UAE!

From the start, our guide Malik made the day unforgettable. He was friendly, professional, and full of great stories about the culture and landscape. He ensured we felt safe and excited through every part of the journey.

The dune bashing was an adrenaline-filled thrill ride—Maliks driving skills through the sand dunes were incredible! Then came the dune buggy ride, and it was next-level fun. Driving through the desert with Malik guiding us was both empowering and breathtaking. The scenery was stunning, and the sense of freedom out there was something special.

After all the action, we were taken to a desert camp where we enjoyed a delicious buffet of authentic Arabic food. The evening show was just as memorable—beautiful belly dancing, traditional music, and an absolutely jaw-dropping fire-breathing performance.

Every part of this tour was perfectly organized and filled with unforgettable moments. Whether you’re visiting Dubai for the first time or the fifth, Dunes Discovery Dubai should be at the top of your list. Don’t miss it!
Best experience, highly recommend. Malik Was the best guide and made it 10x better! This is a must on your list if you come to Dubai.

We had an unforgettable time on our desert safari! The adventure kicked off with an exhilarating dune buggy ride – tearing through the sand with stunning desert views all around. After that, we jumped into a 4x4 for some heart-pounding dune bashing. Our driver was amazing, and it felt like a rollercoaster on sand!

As the sun set, we arrived at a desert camp where we were treated to a delicious buffet dinner – loads of variety and really tasty. The evening entertainment was just as impressive, with belly dancers, traditional performances, and an incredible fire breather who left the whole crowd in awe.

Everything was well organized and the staff were super friendly throughout. Definitely one of the highlights of our trip – would recommend to anyone visiting!
Malik is amazing! I have been with him a few times now and always recommend him to friends! Would throughly recommend him

review_title: Dubai Safari experience: One to remember
